# 正式环境 `.env` 模板

本文档给出一份适合正式环境首次部署时使用的 `.env` 示例。

建议基于发布脚本生成的：

```text
/opt/floralwhispertime/shared/.env
```

进行修改。

## 示例模板

```dotenv
WEB_PORT=8080

MYSQL_DATABASE=floral_whisper_time
MYSQL_USER=floral_whisper
MYSQL_PASSWORD=replace-with-strong-db-password
MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD=replace-with-strong-root-password

ADMIN_USERNAME=admin
ADMIN_PASSWORD=replace-with-strong-admin-password
ADMIN_AUTH_SECRET=replace-with-a-32-plus-char-random-secret
APP_DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=replace-with-another-32-plus-char-random-secret
JWT_ISSUER=flower-shop-backend-java

APP_ENVIRONMENT=production
APP_GIT_REVISION=32b6908
APP_DEPLOYED_AT=2026-05-16T00:30:00+08:00

PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://flowers.example.com
CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN_PATTERNS=https://flowers.example.com,https://www.flowers.example.com
BACKUP_DIR=/app/backups

SERVER_TOMCAT_THREADS_MAX=80
SERVER_TOMCAT_ACCEPT_COUNT=200
SERVER_TOMCAT_MAX_CONNECTIONS=1000
SERVER_TOMCAT_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT=5s

DB_MAX_POOL_SIZE=20
DB_MIN_IDLE=5
DB_CONNECTION_TIMEOUT_MS=3000
DB_VALIDATION_TIMEOUT_MS=1000
DB_IDLE_TIMEOUT_MS=600000
DB_MAX_LIFETIME_MS=1800000

AI_IMAGE_ENABLED=false
AI_IMAGE_PROVIDER=volcengine
VOLCENGINE_API_KEY=
VOLCENGINE_IMAGE_MODEL=doubao-seedream-5-0-260128
VOLCENGINE_BASE_URL=https://operator.las.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v1
VOLCENGINE_IMAGE_GENERATE_PATH=/images/generations
AI_IMAGE_MAX_REFERENCE_FILES=3
AI_IMAGE_MAX_REFERENCE_FILE_SIZE_BYTES=20971520
AI_IMAGE_DOWNLOAD_SUBDIR=ai
AI_IMAGE_REQUEST_TIMEOUT_SECONDS=120
AI_IMAGE_SIZE=1920x1920
AI_IMAGE_RESPONSE_FORMAT=url
AI_IMAGE_WATERMARK=false

PROTECTION_PUBLIC_READ_ENABLED=true
PROTECTION_PUBLIC_READ_CAPACITY=60
PROTECTION_PUBLIC_READ_REFILL_SECONDS=10

PROTECTION_PUBLIC_WRITE_ENABLED=true
PROTECTION_PUBLIC_WRITE_CAPACITY=12
PROTECTION_PUBLIC_WRITE_REFILL_SECONDS=60

PROTECTION_ADMIN_ENABLED=true
PROTECTION_ADMIN_CAPACITY=30
PROTECTION_ADMIN_REFILL_SECONDS=60

PROTECTION_HEAVY_ENABLED=true
PROTECTION_HEAVY_CAPACITY=6
PROTECTION_HEAVY_REFILL_SECONDS=60

PROTECTION_CONCURRENCY_AI_ENABLED=true
PROTECTION_CONCURRENCY_AI_MAX_CONCURRENT=2
PROTECTION_CONCURRENCY_UPLOAD_ENABLED=true
PROTECTION_CONCURRENCY_UPLOAD_MAX_CONCURRENT=4
PROTECTION_CONCURRENCY_CONFIG_IMPORT_ENABLED=true
PROTECTION_CONCURRENCY_CONFIG_IMPORT_MAX_CONCURRENT=1
```

## 必改项

这些字段上线前必须改掉：

- `MYSQL_PASSWORD`
- `MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD`
- `ADMIN_PASSWORD`
- `ADMIN_AUTH_SECRET`
- `APP_DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY`
- `PUBLIC_BASE_URL`
- `CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN_PATTERNS`

## 安全建议

1. `ADMIN_AUTH_SECRET` 和 `APP_DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY` 使用不同随机值
2. 两者长度建议至少 32 位
3. 不要把正式 `.env` 提交进 Git
4. `VOLCENGINE_API_KEY` 建议只在正式启用 AI 时填写
5. 首次部署后进入后台“系统状态”，确认“安全状态”不是高风险

## 常见组合

### 只内网访问

```dotenv
PUBLIC_BASE_URL=http://192.168.1.20:8080
CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN_PATTERNS=http://192.168.1.20:8080
```

### 域名 + HTTPS

```dotenv
PUBLIC_BASE_URL=https://flowers.example.com
CORS_ALLOWED_ORIGIN_PATTERNS=https://flowers.example.com,https://www.flowers.example.com
```

参考：

- [nginx-https-production-example.md](../reference/nginx-https-production-example.md)
